arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres to Arsenal transfer truth, release clause and Man United interest
arts.sum: My expectation is for Manchester United to eventually look at Sporting players in the summer, if Amorim approves; not in January. Gyokeres is a name that will be familiar to Arsenal fans, given the transfer links to the striker.

arts.ttl: Sporting CP vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal make the trip to the Portuguese capital to face Sporting CP in the Champions League tonight. Sporting have thrived in the competition this campaign. Their unbeaten record puts them in second place in the league standings. arts.sum: Arsenal return to Champions League action with confidence this week after getting back to winning ways at the weekend. Mikel Arteta’s team eased past Nottingham Forest in an emphatic performance at the Emirates, with Bukayo Saka, Thomas Partey and Ethan Nwaneri all on target. arts.ttl: Arsenal should be breaking the bank to sign Viktor Gyokeres: Sporting CP goal machine is the missing piece for the Gunners' attack
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side travel to Lisbon in the Champions League on Tuesday and will get a first-hand glimpse of the striker they truly need Mikel Arteta seemed content on keeping Kai Havertz - a £65 million signing that Arsenal shouted from the rooftops was intended to play in central midfield - as his starting No.9, but if Arsenal are to end their two-decade long wait for a Premier League title, then they need more in attack.

arts.ttl: “We know his strengths” – Arsenal star praises rumoured Gunners transfer target
arts.sum: Arsenal are among the numerous big clubs to be linked with in-form Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres, and it seems Gunners goalkeeper David Raya is well aware of the player’s quality. Arsenal will get a closer look at Gyokeres tonight as Mikel Arteta’s side take on Sporting in the Champions League, with Raya discussing the […] The post “We know his strengths” – Arsenal star praises rumoured Gunners transfer target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: We simulated Sporting CP vs Arsenal to get a Champions League score prediction
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli. Arsenal almost got off to the perfect start in Portugal when a short corner routine saw the ball played to Partey on the edge of the box, but unlike at the weekend, he couldn't find the net as his long-range effort rattled the post.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal battling Newcastle United for transfer of in-form Premier League attacker
arts.sum: Arsenal and Newcastle United are among the transfer suitors for Brentford forward Bryan Mbeumo ahead of January, CaughtOffside understands. The Cameroon international has been in superb form in the Premier League this season, and sources with a close understanding of his situation have informed CaughtOffside that Arsenal and Newcastle are interested in him. arts.ttl: Arsenal ready to activate €60m release clause for January signing
arts.sum: Arsenal are prepared to activate Martin Zubimendi's €60 million release clause in order to sign the Real Sociedad midfielder in January. The Real Sociedad star decided to snub Liverpool this summer despite initially looking set to depart his boyhood club.

arts.ttl: Can Gyokeres match Messi's record season?
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres is on target to break Lionel Messi's record-breaking goalscoring season. But can he do it?
